subqueries.label: built artifacts
subqueries.search_query: "Claude Fable 5" built project demo app game
subqueries.ranking_query: Find concrete apps, games, demos, websites, tools, or projects people say they built with Claude Fable 5.

subqueries.label: made with fable
subqueries.ranking_query: Find public posts or repos where creators explicitly say an artifact was made or built with Fable 5.

subqueries.label: game and agent demos
subqueries.ranking_query: Find agentic game demos, autonomous workflows, and prototype videos made with Fable 5.

notes: Used after Browser/X discovery pass; focus on non-X corroboration and discoverable repos/discussions.
